## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new visitor.* property or utility method)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Every new or changed function has a comment explaining its purpose.
- [ ] Every non-trivial line has an inline comment.
- [ ] New visitor.* properties are documented in README.md.
- [ ] Tests pass : `npx jest`
- [ ] New utility methods have a test in `src/test/visitor.test.js`.
- [ ] The library still works without any build step (plain script tag in an HTML file).
- [ ] No external dependencies were added.

## Testing notes

Describe how you tested this change, including which browsers you checked manually.
